description: A designed graphic styled as a screenshot of a Truth Social / Twitter-style post from Donald J. Trump. At the top-left is a circular profile avatar showing Trump's face stylized/painted in the American flag (a blue half-face with white stars and a red-and-white-striped half-face). Next to it is the bold black display name 'Donald J. Trump' followed by a pink/magenta verified checkmark badge and a small black square badge (the Truth Social logo). Below the name is the grey handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The body is large black-on-white sans-serif text reading verbatim: 'For Iran, the Clock is Ticking, and they better get moving, FAST, or there won't be anything left of them. TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE! President DJT'. The visual style is minimalist (plain white background, black text), but the post is a curated, branded social-media artifact rather than a candid photo. The propaganda/messaging technique is an explicit ultimatum and military threat against Iran, projecting presidential resolve, urgency and dominance through capitalized emphasis ('FAST', 'TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE'). Target audience: the administration's social-media following, domestic supporters and Iran itself, signaling maximum-pressure brinkmanship.
notable_text: For Iran, the Clock is Ticking, and they better get moving, FAST, or there won't be anything left of them. TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE! President DJT
